name: "A Case for K9"
effectText: When this card is activated: You can add 1 "K9" monster from your Deck to your hand. "K9" monsters you control gain 900 ATK during any turn in which your opponent has activated a monster effect in the hand or GY. If this card in the Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by card effect: You can Set 1 "K9" Quick-Play Spell from your Deck or GY. You can only use this effect of ""A Case for K9"" once per turn. You can only activate 1 ""A Case for K9"" per turn.
translatedEffectText: 这张卡发动时： 你可以 把 1 张 "K9" 怪兽 从卡组加入手牌。 "K9" 怪兽 你控制的 gain 900 攻击力 during any turn in which 对手 has activated a 怪兽 effect in the hand or 墓地。 如果魔法与陷阱区域的这张卡被卡的效果破坏： 你可以 盖放 1 "K9" 速攻魔法 从卡组或墓地。 这个效果每回合只能使用 1 次： ""A Case for K9"" 1 回合 1 次。 每回合只能发动 1 张 ""A Case for K9"" per turn。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以从卡组把指定卡加入手牌；会破坏场上的卡；效果与墓地资源有关；会提升怪兽攻击力。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在对手场上出现关键卡时使用，优先处理高威胁目标。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: "A" Cell Recombination Device

During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the Graveyard: You can banish this card from your Graveyard; add 1 "Alien" monster from your Deck to your hand.

2+ monsters, including a Fiend monster

● Destroy 1 card on the field.

translatedEffectText: Target 1 of your banished 怪兽 and 1 of 对手's banished 怪兽； 特殊召唤 your 怪兽 to 对手's field， and if you do， 特殊召唤 that opponent's 怪兽 to your field。 每回合只能发动 1 张 "Alpha Summon" per turn。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以特殊召唤怪兽；会除外卡牌；发动时需要选择目标。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在需要补充场面、延续展开，或把关键怪兽重新利用时使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Alpha The Electromagnet Warrior
effectText: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Level 8 "Magna Warrior" monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Alpha The Electromagnet Warrior" once per turn. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 Level 4 "Magnet Warrior" monster from your Deck.
translatedEffectText: If this card is Normal or 特殊召唤： 你可以 把 1 张 等级 8 "Magna 战士族" 怪兽 从卡组加入手牌。 这个效果每回合只能使用 1 次： "Alpha The Electromagnet 战士族" 1 回合 1 次。 对手回合中 (快速效果)： 你可以 Tribute this card； 特殊召唤 1 只 等级 4 "Magnet 战士族" 怪兽 from 你的卡组。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以特殊召唤怪兽；可以从卡组把指定卡加入手牌。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在需要补充场面、延续展开，或把关键怪兽重新利用时使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Alpha The Magnet Warrior
effectText: ''Alpha, Beta, and Gamma meld as one to form a powerful monster.''
translatedEffectText: ''Alpha， Beta， and Gamma meld as one to form a powerful 怪兽。''
childFriendlySummary: 通常怪兽，没有额外效果，主要依靠攻击力、守备力和召唤条件。
recommendedUsage: 推荐作为基础战斗怪兽、素材，或与对应系列支援卡配合使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与通常怪兽支援、素材需求，或对应系列专属卡配合。

name: Alpha, the Master of Beasts
effectText: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) while the total ATK of all monsters your opponent controls is more than that of all monsters you control. You can target any number of Beast, Beast-Warrior, and/or Winged Beast monsters you control; return them to the hand, then, return face-up monsters your opponent controls to the hand, equal to the number of cards you returned to the hand, also for the rest of this turn, "Alpha, the Master of Beasts" you control cannot attack directly. You can only use this effect of "Alpha, the Master of Beasts" once per turn.
translatedEffectText: 不能通常召唤/盖放。 必须先特殊召唤 (from 你的手牌) while the total 攻击力 of all 怪兽 对手 controls is more than that of all 怪兽 你控制的。 你可以 target any number of Beast， Beast-战士族， and/or Winged Beast 怪兽 你控制的； return them to the hand， then， return 表侧表示 怪兽 对手 controls to the hand， equal to the number of cards you returned to the hand， also for the rest of this turn， "Alpha， the Master of Beasts" 你控制的 cannot attack directly。 这个效果每回合只能使用 1 次： "Alpha， the Master of Beasts" 1 回合 1 次。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以特殊召唤怪兽；会限制怪兽攻击；发动时需要选择目标。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在需要补充场面、延续展开，或把关键怪兽重新利用时使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Alsei, the Sylvan High Protector
effectText:
2 Level 8 monsters
Once per turn: You can declare 1 card name; excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is the declared card, add it to your hand. Otherwise, send it to the Graveyard. If a card is sent from your Deck to the Graveyard by a card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card, then target 1 card on the field; place that target on either the top or bottom of the Deck. You can only use this effect of "Alsei, the Sylvan High Protector" once per turn.
translatedEffectText: 2 等级 8 怪兽 1 回合 1 次： 你可以 declare 1 card name； excavate the top card of 你的卡组， and if it is the declared card， add it to 你的手牌。 否则将其送去墓地。 If a card is sent from 你的卡组 to the 墓地 by a card effect (except during the Damage Step)： 你可以 detach 1 Xyz Material from this card， then 以场上 1 张卡为对象； place that target on either the top or bottom of the 卡组。 这个效果每回合只能使用 1 次： "Alsei， the Sylvan High Protector" 1 回合 1 次。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：效果与墓地资源有关；发动时需要选择目标。
recommendedUsage: 推荐结合当前场面决定时机，优先在能改变场面交换结果时使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Altar for Tribute

translatedEffectText: Select 1 怪兽 on 你场上 and send it to the 墓地。 Increase your Life Points by an amount equal to the original 攻击力 of the 怪兽。

name: Altergeist Adminia
effectText:
2+ "Altergeist" monsters
If this card is Link Summoned: You can Set 1 "Altergeist" Trap directly from your Deck. Once while this card is face-up on the field, during the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can send 1 card you control to the GY, then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; take control of that target, and if you do, it is also treated as an "Altergeist" monster. You can only use each effect of "Altergeist Adminia" once per turn.

name: Altergeist Camouflage

Negate an opponent's monster effect that activates by targeting the equipped monster. If an "Altergeist" card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.

name: Altergeist Meluseek
effectText: This card can attack directly. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can target 1 card your opponent controls; send it to the GY. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can add 1 "Altergeist" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Altergeist Meluseek". You can only use this effect of "Altergeist Meluseek" once per turn.
translatedEffectText: This card can attack directly。 When this card inflicts 战斗伤害 to 对手： 可以以对手场上 1 张卡为对象； send it to the 墓地。 If this card is sent from the field to the 墓地： 你可以 把 1 张 "Altergeist" 怪兽 从卡组加入手牌， except "Altergeist Meluseek"。 这个效果每回合只能使用 1 次： "Altergeist Meluseek" 1 回合 1 次。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以从卡组把指定卡加入手牌；会影响战斗伤害；效果与墓地资源有关；发动时需要选择目标。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在回合前段使用，先把需要的资源加入手牌，再安排后续展开。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Altergeist Memorygant
effectText:
2+ "Altergeist" monsters
During the Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 other monster; this card gains ATK equal to that Tributed monster's ATK on the field. When this card destroys a monster by battle: You can destroy 1 monster your opponent controls, and if you do, this card can make a second attack in a row. If this card would be destroyed, you can banish 1 monster from your GY instead. You can only use each effect of "Altergeist Memorygant" once per turn.
translatedEffectText: 2+ "Altergeist" 怪兽 During the 战斗阶段 (快速效果)： 你可以 Tribute 1 other 怪兽； this card gains 攻击力 equal to that Tributed 怪兽's 攻击力 场上。 When this card destroys a 怪兽 by battle： 你可以 destroy 1 怪兽 对手 controls， and if you do， this card can make a second attack in a row。 If this card would be destroyed， 你可以 banish 1 怪兽 from your 墓地 instead。 以下各效果各回合只能使用 1 次： "Altergeist Memorygant" 1 回合 1 次。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：会破坏场上的卡；会除外卡牌；效果与墓地资源有关；会提升怪兽攻击力。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在对手场上出现关键卡时使用，优先处理高威胁目标。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Altergeist Multifaker

You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except "Altergeist" monsters. You can only use each effect of "Altergeist Multifaker" once per turn.

name: Archfiend Strategy
effectText:
Fiend monsters in the Extra Monster Zone(s) gain 1000 ATK. You can activate 1 of these effects;
● Banish 1 Fiend monster or 1 "Archfiend" card from your hand or GY; add 1 "Archfiend" card from your Deck to your hand, except a Field Spell.
● Add 1 "Archfiend" Pendulum Monster from your Deck to your face-up Extra Deck.
You can only use this effect of "Archfiend Strategy" once per turn.

synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Atomic Scrap Dragon
effectText:
1 "Scrap" Tuner + 2 or more non-Tuner monsters
Once per turn, you can select 1 card you control and up to 3 cards in your opponent's Graveyard. Destroy your selected card and return the opponent's cards you selected to the Deck. When this card is destroyed by your opponent's card (either by battle or by card effect) and sent to the Graveyard, select 1 non-Synchro "Scrap" monster in your Graveyard, and Special Summon it.

recommendedUsage: 推荐在需要补充场面、延续展开，或把关键怪兽重新利用时使用。

During your Main Phase: You can send 1 "Evil Eye" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Basilius, Familiar of the Evil Eye" once per turn.
translatedEffectText: If 你控制的 an "Evil Eye" 怪兽， 你可以 将这张卡特殊召唤 (from 你的手牌)。 你可以 only 特殊召唤 "Basilius， Familiar of the Evil Eye" 1 回合 1 次 this way。 在你的主要阶段： 你可以 send 1 "Evil Eye" Spell/Trap from 你的卡组 to the 墓地。 这个效果每回合只能使用 1 次： "Basilius， Familiar of the Evil Eye" 1 回合 1 次。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以特殊召唤怪兽；可以从卡组把怪兽送去墓地；效果与墓地资源有关。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在需要补充场面、延续展开，或把关键怪兽重新利用时使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Basiltrice, Familiar of the Evil Eye
localizedName: Basiltrice, Familiar of the Evil Eye
effectText: If you control an "Evil Eye" monster and this card is in your hand or GY (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. During your opponent's turn, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Link Summon 1 "Evil Eye" Link Monster using monsters you control as material. When you do, you can also use "Evil Eye" Equip Spells you control as "Evil Eye" monsters. You can only use each effect of "Basiltrice, Familiar of the Evil Eye" once per turn.
translatedEffectText: If 你控制的 an "Evil Eye" 怪兽 and this card is in 你的手牌 or 墓地 (快速效果)： 你可以 将这张卡特殊召唤， but banish it when it leaves the field。 对手回合中， 你可以 (快速效果)： Immediately after this effect resolves， Link Summon 1 "Evil Eye" Link 怪兽 using 怪兽 你控制的 as material。 When you do， 你可以 also use "Evil Eye" Equip Spells 你控制的 as "Evil Eye" 怪兽。 以下各效果各回合只能使用 1 次： "Basiltrice， Familiar of the Evil Eye" 1 回合 1 次。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以特殊召唤怪兽；会除外卡牌；效果与墓地资源有关。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在需要补充场面、延续展开，或把关键怪兽重新利用时使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Bat
effectText: ''A mechanical bat that drops blasts from its wings.''
translatedEffectText: ''A mechanical bat that drops blasts from its wings.''
childFriendlySummary: 通常怪兽，没有额外效果，主要依靠攻击力、守备力和召唤条件。
recommendedUsage: 推荐作为基础战斗怪兽、素材，或与对应系列支援卡配合使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与通常怪兽支援、素材需求，或对应系列专属卡配合。

name: Bat, the Forest Ninja
effectText: If a face-up card is in a Field Zone, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Bat, the Forest Ninja" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned and "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn" is in your field or GY: You can add 1 LIGHT Beast monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Bat, the Forest Ninja" once per turn.
translatedEffectText: If a 表侧表示 card is in a Field Zone， 你可以 将这张卡特殊召唤 (from 你的手牌)。 你可以 only 特殊召唤 "Bat， the Forest Ninja" 1 回合 1 次 this way。 If this card is Normal or 特殊召唤 and "Fairy Tale Prologue： Journey's Dawn" is in your field or 墓地： 你可以 把 1 张 光属性 Beast 怪兽 从卡组加入手牌。 这个效果每回合只能使用 1 次： "Bat， the Forest Ninja" 1 回合 1 次。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以特殊召唤怪兽；可以从卡组把指定卡加入手牌；效果与墓地资源有关。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在需要补充场面、延续展开，或把关键怪兽重新利用时使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Batteryman 9-Volt
effectText: When this card is Summoned: You can add 1 "Batteryman" monster from your Deck to your hand, and if you do, this card's ATK and DEF become double its original ATK and DEF. You can only use this effect of "Batteryman 9-Volt" once per turn. During your End Phase: Destroy this card.
translatedEffectText: When this card is Summoned： 你可以 把 1 张 "Batteryman" 怪兽 从卡组加入手牌， and if you do， this card's 攻击力 and DEF become double its original 攻击力 and DEF。 这个效果每回合只能使用 1 次： "Batteryman 9-Volt" 1 回合 1 次。 在结束阶段： Destroy this card。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以从卡组把指定卡加入手牌；会破坏场上的卡。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在对手场上出现关键卡时使用，优先处理高威胁目标。
synergyNotes: 适合与需要稳定检索关键卡、围绕固定核心组件展开的策略配合。

name: Batteryman Fuel Cell
effectText: If you control 2 or more face-up "Batteryman" monsters, you can Special Summon this card from your hand. Once per turn, you can Tribute 1 "Batteryman" monster, except this card, to select 1 card your opponent controls and return it to its owner's hand.
